name: Feta-Tomato Toppers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the crumbled feta cheese, diced tomatoes, finely chopped red onion, freshly ground black pepper, and dried oregano.
2. Spoon the mixture onto each melba round or toast.
3. Serve and enjoy.
Makes 36 servings. Preparation time: About 8 to 10 minutes.
